Question? Give us feedback Edit this page 
ComponentsButton

Button

A versatile action trigger available in three design languages, each with primary, secondary, destructive, ghost, and outline variants.

Design Language Comparison

Neobrutalism
Shadcn-inspired
Flowbite-inspired

Neobrutalism

Hard black shadow, thick border, saturated yellow primary. Translates on click.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Neobrutalism Button</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="neobrutalism.css" />
</head>
<body style="padding: 32px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;">

  <!-- Primary -->
  <button class="nb-button nb-button--primary nb-button--md" type="button">Primary</button>

  <!-- Secondary -->
  <button class="nb-button nb-button--secondary nb-button--md" type="button">Secondary</button>

  <!-- Destructive -->
  <button class="nb-button nb-button--destructive nb-button--md" type="button">Destructive</button>

  <!-- Ghost -->
  <button class="nb-button nb-button--ghost nb-button--md" type="button">Ghost</button>

  <!-- Outline -->
  <button class="nb-button nb-button--outline nb-button--md" type="button">Outline</button>

  <!-- Small -->
  <button class="nb-button nb-button--primary nb-button--sm" type="button">Small</button>

  <!-- Large -->
  <button class="nb-button nb-button--primary nb-button--lg" type="button">Large</button>

  <!-- Disabled -->
  <button class="nb-button nb-button--primary nb-button--md" type="button" disabled>Disabled</button>

</body>
</html>

Shadcn-inspired

Neutral zinc palette, subtle shadow, 6 px radius, accessible focus ring.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Shadcn-inspired Button</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="shadcn.css" />
</head>
<body style="padding: 32px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;">

  <!-- Primary -->
  <button class="shadcn-button shadcn-button--primary shadcn-button--md" type="button">Primary</button>

  <!-- Secondary -->
  <button class="shadcn-button shadcn-button--secondary shadcn-button--md" type="button">Secondary</button>

  <!-- Destructive -->
  <button class="shadcn-button shadcn-button--destructive shadcn-button--md" type="button">Destructive</button>

  <!-- Ghost -->
  <button class="shadcn-button shadcn-button--ghost shadcn-button--md" type="button">Ghost</button>

  <!-- Outline -->
  <button class="shadcn-button shadcn-button--outline shadcn-button--md" type="button">Outline</button>

  <!-- Small -->
  <button class="shadcn-button shadcn-button--primary shadcn-button--sm" type="button">Small</button>

  <!-- Large -->
  <button class="shadcn-button shadcn-button--primary shadcn-button--lg" type="button">Large</button>

  <!-- Disabled -->
  <button class="shadcn-button shadcn-button--primary shadcn-button--md" type="button" disabled>Disabled</button>

</body>
</html>

Flowbite-inspired

Blue #1c64f2 primary, 8 px radius, smooth hover transition, blue glow on focus.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Flowbite-inspired Button</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="flowbite.css" />
</head>
<body style="padding: 32px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;">

  <!-- Primary -->
  <button class="fb-button fb-button--primary fb-button--md" type="button">Primary</button>

  <!-- Secondary -->
  <button class="fb-button fb-button--secondary fb-button--md" type="button">Secondary</button>

  <!-- Destructive -->
  <button class="fb-button fb-button--destructive fb-button--md" type="button">Destructive</button>

  <!-- Ghost -->
  <button class="fb-button fb-button--ghost fb-button--md" type="button">Ghost</button>

  <!-- Outline -->
  <button class="fb-button fb-button--outline fb-button--md" type="button">Outline</button>

  <!-- Small -->
  <button class="fb-button fb-button--primary fb-button--sm" type="button">Small</button>

  <!-- Large -->
  <button class="fb-button fb-button--primary fb-button--lg" type="button">Large</button>

  <!-- Disabled -->
  <button class="fb-button fb-button--primary fb-button--md" type="button" disabled>Disabled</button>

</body>
</html>
Last updated on April 26, 2026
